xmlversion.version: y23ww45 ajrojasa First Version / proposal for CWF
y24ww08 ajrojasa Product setup name fixed
y24ww10 ajrojasa File updated to match Tap2Cri_ArraySuperGroups_fusedef_v1 Split by die
y24ww10 ajrojasa File updated to match Tap2Cri_ArraySuperGroups_fusedef_v2 Split by die
y24ww13 ajrojasa Fuse data sizes fixed based on the VFDM setup. Only keep CWF product setup
y24ww19 ajrojasa Adjust L2 tag row repair + valid bits lenght -1 bit based on Fuse team feedback
y24ww20 ajrojasa Merged with initial version 03 to order the fuses by receiving address
y24ww21 ajrojasa Tap2Cri setup validated for one defect inserted at L2Tag. Pattern mod ok
y24ww21 ajrojasa Let's use VFDM_IN_MODULE for Tap2Cri. So Tap2Cri and VFDM can be run B2B
y24ww21 ajrojasa Added VFDM setup to reuse Tap2Cri string but for VFDM purposes
y24ww21 ajrojasa Adjust the size of the L2C6 valid shared bits at segment 18
y24ww23 ajrojasa Added LDR0, LDR1 and LDR2
y24ww23 ajrojasa L2C6 and L2STA Row repair fixes

product_setup.name: PTL
product_setup.description: Repair to fuse setup for PTL to be used for SDKTR with the R2F mapping where CRF BUS is first
